name: National Cancer Registry
description: National Cancer Registry is register of oncological diseases, which periodically monitor them and their development in time. NCR provides aggregated data for statistical surveys at both national and international level, as well as for epidemiological studies and medical research. NCR is a population-wide registry, which follows the monitoring of neoplasms in the population of the country introduced in the 1950s and has been operated as a population registry of records of individual neoplasms since 1976.
